# Hytale Server SDK Reference

> Flat index of public SDK types by package. Each entry shows the class declaration (kind, extends, implements) so you can pick which file to read for full method signatures.

Source: `javap -protected` over the Hytale server jar. Excludes package-private classes and inner classes. FQCNs are shortened to leaf names for readability.

Regenerate per-package files + this index: `node tools/sdk/extract-sdk-reference.js` (slow — re-reads the jar)
Regenerate this index only:               `node tools/sdk/build-sdk-llms-txt.js` (fast — reads existing .md files)

## How to use this file

- Grep for the class name or interface you need: `grep ClassName llms.txt`
- The package heading above each match tells you which `.md` file to read for method signatures.
- Class entries are listed in jar/javap order within each package; packages in extractor order (lifecycle → commands → world → components → modules → npc → protocol).

## com.hypixel.hytale.component
*ComponentType, Ref, Store — entity-component primitives* — [`com.hypixel.hytale.component.md`](./com.hypixel.hytale.component.md) (27)

- `AddReason` — final class AddReason extends Enum<AddReason>
- `Archetype` — class Archetype<ECS_TYPE> implements Query<ECS_TYPE>
- `ArchetypeChunk` — class ArchetypeChunk<ECS_TYPE>
- `CommandBuffer` — class CommandBuffer<ECS_TYPE> implements ComponentAccessor<ECS_TYPE>
- `Component` — interface Component<ECS_TYPE> extends Cloneable
- `ComponentAccessor` — interface ComponentAccessor<ECS_TYPE>
- `ComponentRegistration` — final class ComponentRegistration<ECS_TYPE, T extends Component<ECS_TYPE>> extends Record
- `ComponentRegistry` — class ComponentRegistry<ECS_TYPE> implements IComponentRegistry<ECS_TYPE>
- `ComponentRegistryProxy` — class ComponentRegistryProxy<ECS_TYPE> implements IComponentRegistry<ECS_TYPE>
- `ComponentType` — class ComponentType<ECS_TYPE, T extends Component<ECS_TYPE>> implements Comparable<ComponentType<ECS_TYPE, ?>>, Query<ECS_TYPE>
- `DisableProcessingAssert` — interface DisableProcessingAssert
- `EmptyResourceStorage` — class EmptyResourceStorage implements IResourceStorage
- `Holder` — class Holder<ECS_TYPE>
- `IComponentRegistry` — interface IComponentRegistry<ECS_TYPE>
- `IResourceStorage` — interface IResourceStorage
- `NonSerialized` — class NonSerialized<ECS_TYPE> implements Component<ECS_TYPE>
- `NonTicking` — class NonTicking<ECS_TYPE> implements Component<ECS_TYPE>
- `ReadWriteQuery` — class ReadWriteQuery<ECS_TYPE> implements ReadWriteArchetypeQuery<ECS_TYPE>
- `Ref` — class Ref<ECS_TYPE>
- `RemoveReason` — final class RemoveReason extends Enum<RemoveReason>
- `Resource` — interface Resource<ECS_TYPE> extends Cloneable
- `ResourceRegistration` — final class ResourceRegistration<ECS_TYPE, T extends Resource<ECS_TYPE>> extends Record
- `ResourceType` — class ResourceType<ECS_TYPE, T extends Resource<ECS_TYPE>> implements Comparable<ResourceType<ECS_TYPE, ?>>
- `Store` — class Store<ECS_TYPE> implements ComponentAccessor<ECS_TYPE>
- `SystemGroup` — class SystemGroup<ECS_TYPE> implements Comparable<SystemGroup<ECS_TYPE>>
- `SystemType` — class SystemType<ECS_TYPE, T extends ISystem<ECS_TYPE>> implements Comparable<SystemType<ECS_TYPE, ?>>
- `WeakComponentReference` — class WeakComponentReference<ECS_TYPE, T extends Component<ECS_TYPE>>

## com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.command.system.basecommands
*Abstract base classes for player/world/async commands* — [`com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.command.system.basecommands.md`](./com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.command.system.basecommands.md) (10)

- `AbstractAsyncCommand` — abstract class AbstractAsyncCommand extends AbstractCommand
- `AbstractAsyncPlayerCommand` — abstract class AbstractAsyncPlayerCommand extends AbstractAsyncCommand
- `AbstractAsyncWorldCommand` — abstract class AbstractAsyncWorldCommand extends AbstractAsyncCommand

- `AbstractTargetPlayersCommand` — abstract class AbstractTargetPlayersCommand extends AbstractAsyncCommand
- `AbstractWorldCommand` — abstract class AbstractWorldCommand extends AbstractAsyncCommand
- `CommandBase` — abstract class CommandBase extends AbstractCommand
